title: Microfibre Hair Towel Turban, 2 Pack Hair Towel Wraps, Quick Dry Microfibre Towel hair, Super Absorbent Drying hair Turban for Women
features: 🛀【Absorbent & Quick Drying】-Made of revolutionary microfiber fabric that is extremely soft, it absorbs almost 80% water in 10 minutes from your wet hair. Water absorption speed is more than 7 times of ordinary towel, quickly dry wet hair, super absorbent, ultra soft and breathable, you will not feel beads of cold water dripping down your back anymore. Protects your hair from friction caused by bath towels and substantial heat damage from blow dryers

🛀【Zero Damage to Your Hair】- Ompared with ordinary towel and hair dryer, Hoiny microfibre hair towel protect your hair from friction caused by bath towel and long time harmful heat of blow dryers. Hair towel wrap also helps your hair anti frizz and reduces risk of split ends, your hair’s texture will be more smoother and shinier. protect your hair from hot air damage and reduces split ends and frizz

🛀【Bear Button Design】- Microfibre towel hair design with Bear buttons straps are firmly stitched, rest assured to no slipping or dripping. Simple to put on than a ordinary square towel. Just put it on head and get dressed while drying your hair without discomfort and worry about head towel wrap falling off your head

🛀【Easy To Clean & Reusable】- Microfiber hair drying towel can be cleaned by washing machine, hand wash, dryer, etc. Please ensure that the hair towel wrap is dry before using. In addition, the reusable hair tower turban allows you to enjoy the shower without worrying about getting your hair wet

🛀【Wide Application】- Washing does not fade, antibacterial, water absorption of more than 80%, soft, collapsible, easy to carry, ideal for travel, hotel or family, spa, bath and professional hair salon use
